name: Pesto (Basil Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree all the ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Alternatively, pound basil leaves, garlic, salt, and pine nuts together with a mortar and pestle.
3. Beat in the olive oil.
4. Use in soups or toss with hot pasta for a main dish.
5. Smaller quantities make an ideal appetizer.
6. The sauce will keep in the refrigerator or can be frozen.
